keyValues.price.applier.markup.name: Markup
keyValues.price.applier.markup.description: Applies a markup to the price according to the configured markup ranges.
keyValues.price.applier.price.rounding.name: Price rounding
keyValues.price.applier.price.rounding.description: Rounds the price according to the configured price rounding step.
keyValues.price.applier.minimum.supplier.price.des: Raises the price to the minimum supplier offer price when market data is available.
keyValues.pricing.setting.name: Pricing settings
keyValues.pricing.setting.description: Controls price calculation, markup selection, offer lifetime, and supplier delivery scoring.
keyValues.pricing.setting.input.invalid: Invalid pricing settings data was provided.
keyValues.pricing.setting.pricing.strategy.name: Pricing strategy
keyValues.pricing.setting.pricing.strategy.descrip: Defines which supplier offer price is used as the base price.
keyValues.pricing.setting.selected.markup.id.name: Selected markup group
keyValues.pricing.setting.selected.markup.id.descr: Markup group used for price calculation. Leave empty to use the latest auto-generated markup group.
keyValues.pricing.setting.default.markup.name: Default markup
keyValues.pricing.setting.default.markup.descripti: Markup value used when no configured markup range matches the base price.
keyValues.pricing.setting.offer.ttl.name: Offer lifetime
keyValues.pricing.setting.offer.ttl.description: Time period during which cached supplier offers remain valid.
keyValues.pricing.setting.price.rounding.step.name: Price rounding step
keyValues.pricing.setting.price.rounding.step.desc: Step used to round calculated prices.
keyValues.pricing.setting.delivery.day.penalty.des: Cost penalty added per delivery day when supplier offers are scored.
